# StackSwitch
> StackSwitch compares 85+ SaaS tools across pricing, features, and alternatives.

## About
StackSwitch is an independent SaaS comparison directory. We help teams find the right software by comparing pricing plans, features, user ratings (G2/Capterra), and alternatives — without vendor bias or sponsored placements.

## Content
- 85+ SaaS tools compared
- 22 categories (CRM, project management, email marketing, HR, analytics, and more)
- Head-to-head comparisons, alternatives pages, and pricing breakdowns
- Buyer guides for evaluating software

## Sitemap
https://stackswitch.co/sitemap-index.xml

## Contact
hello@stackswitch.co
